articles.author: Jesse Rogers
articles.title: White Sox say 3 candidates for No. 1 pick in MLB amateur draft - ESPN
articles.description: The White Sox have homed in on three candidates for the No. 1 pick in the MLB amateur draft: UCLA shortstop Roch Cholowsky, Georgia Tech catcher Vahn Lackey and Texas high school shortstop Grady Emerson.
articles.content: CHICAGO -- With just three days until the MLB amateur draft, the Chicago White Sox are still deciding among three players for the No. 1 pick: UCLA shortstop Roch Cholowsky, Georgia Tech catcher Vahn … [+3499 chars]

articles.author: Ram Iyer
articles.title: Blue Origin reportedly raising $10B at $130B valuation - TechCrunch
articles.description: Blue Origin is raising $10 billion at a $130 billion pre-money valuation from Coatue Asset Management, Bezos himself, and other big-name investors, The New York Times reported.
articles.content: Billionaire Jeff Bezos’ space rocket company Blue Origin is raising $10 billion at a $130 billion pre-money valuation from Coatue Asset Management, Bezos himself, and other large investors, The New Y… [+1515 chars]
